title: The Escape Plan Tightens

scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Was there an explosion on the tanker!!?

dialogue.speaker: Buffalo
dialogue.text: This is Buffalo, reporting from punk Hazard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Retrieve him as quickly as possible

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
